text:
Experiment task

You will first see an image depicting a situation or one or more creatures.

In some cases, a word will appear under the image.

After viewing the image and reading the word (if present), you will be asked to list the first three associations that come to mind when thinking about the creatures or situations shown in the image.

Please try not to think too much and enter the first words that occur to you.

Make sure that all three responses are different from each other.

Once you proceed to the response screen, you cannot go back to the previous screen with the image.

Please pay attention and provide your associations immediately after viewing the image and reading the word (if there is one).

You will not be able to enter the word that appeared under the image as a response.

If you try to do so, you will be prompted to adjust your response.

Do not rush: the Continue button will be disabled for the first 5 seconds after the image is presented.
